descs.desc: On kill, heal all allies for 10 SP and apply 1 [PenetrateDamageUp] and [HitDamageUp]
On kill, heal all allies for 10 SP and apply 1 [PenetrateDamageUp] and [HitDamageUp]

1020401.name: Whistles
1020401.desc:
At the start of the combat phase, heal 2 allies with the least SP for 15 SP.
If the ally is an 'N Corp. Fanatic', also apply 1 Fanatic.

1020421.name: Whispers
1020421.desc:
At the start of the combat phase, heal 1 ally with the least SP for 15 SP.
If the ally is an 'N Corp. Fanatic', also apply 1 Fanatic.

1020411.name: Whistles
1020411.desc:
At the start of the combat phase, heal 2 allies with the least SP for 15 SP.
If the ally is an 'N Corp. Fanatic', also apply 2 Fanatic.

1020431.name: Whispers
1020431.desc:
At the start of the combat phase, heal 1 ally with the least SP for 15 SP.
If the ally is an 'N Corp. Fanatic', also apply 2 Fanatic.
